2026-04-24T01:53:25.2839132Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-24T01:53:25.2839658Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-24T01:53:25.2840065Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-24T01:53:25.2840424Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-24T01:53:25.2840718Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-24T01:53:25.2840960Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-24T01:53:25.2841117Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-24T01:53:25.2841299Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-24T01:53:25.2841467Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-24T01:53:25.2841691Z [36;1m{[0m

2026-04-24T01:53:25.2842156Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-24T01:53:25.2842410Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

2026-04-24T01:54:30.7164314Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-24T01:54:16.382686778Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"number\":58627,\"title\":\"[MPG codegen] ToRequestContent not emitted for extensible-enum / union body parameters causes CS0117\",\"body\":\"### Summary\\n\\nThe MPG code generator emits a call to `.ToRequestContent(payload)` for any **non-primitive** request body parameter, but only actually synthesizes the `ToRequestContent` helper method on **MRW model** types. When the body parameter type is an **extensible-enum / union struct** (or any non-MRW type), the helper is never generated, so the generated rest-operation method fails to compile with **CS0117: \\u0026#39;\\u0026#39; does not contain a definition for \\u0026#39;ToRequestContent\\u0026#39;**.\\n\\n### Concrete repro — Azure.ResourceManager.Marketplace\\n\\n- **Spec (TypeSpec)**: `specification/marketplace/resource-manager/Microsoft.Marketplace/Marketplace/routes.tsp`\\n  ```typespec\\n  interface PrivateStoreCollectionOperationGroup {\\n    @Azure.ResourceManager.Private.legacyResourceOperation(Collection, \\u0026#34;action\\u0026#34;)\\n    @route(\\u0026#34;/providers/Microsoft.Marketplace/privateStores/{privateStoreId}/collections/{collectionId}\\u0026#34;)\\n    @post\\n    post(\\n      ...ApiVersionParameter,\\n      @path privateStoreId: string,\\n      @path collectionId: string,\\n      @bodyRoot payload?: Operation,\\n    ): OkResponse | ErrorResponse;\\n  }\\n  ```\\n  `Operation` is an **extensible enum** defined in `models.tsp`:\\n  ```typespec\\n  union Operation {\\n    string,\\n    DeletePrivateStoreOffer: \\u0026#34;DeletePrivateStoreOffer\\u0026#34;,\\n    Ping: \\u0026#34;Ping\\u0026#34;,\\n    DeletePrivateStoreCollection: \\u0026#34;DeletePrivateStoreCollection\\u0026#34;,\\n    DeletePrivateStoreCollectionOffer: \\u0026#34;DeletePrivateStoreCollectionOffer\\u0026#34;,\\n  }\\n  ```\\n\\n- **Legacy Swagger (for reference)**: `specification/marketplace/resource-manager/Microsoft.Marketplace/preview/2023-01-01-preview/privateStore.json` — same POST shape, `payload` has `$ref` to `Operation` enum with `x-ms-enum.modelAsString: true`.\\n\\n- **Generated code (broken)**: `sdk/marketplace/Azure.ResourceManager.Marketplace/src/Generated/PrivateStoreCollectionInfoResource.cs`\\n  ```csharp\\n  public virtual Response Delete(PrivateStoreOperation? payload = default, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)\\n  {\\n      // ...\\n      using var message = _restClient.CreateDeleteRequest(\\n          Id.SubscriptionId, Guid.Parse(Id.Name), Guid.Parse(Id.Parent.Name),\\n          PrivateStoreOperation.ToRequestContent(payload),   // \\u0026lt;-- CS0117 here\\n          context);\\n      // ...\\n  }\\n  ```\\n  `PrivateStoreOperation` is the generated extensible-enum struct (`Generated/Models/PrivateStoreOperation.cs`) and has no `ToRequestContent` method.\\n\\n### Root cause (MPG generator source)\\n\\n- **Microsoft.Generator.CSharp.ClientModel** / `ParameterContextRegistry` emits `.ToRequestContent(payload)` for any non-primitive body parameter.\\n- **SerializationVisitor** (http-client-csharp-mgmt) only synthesizes the `ToRequestContent` helper on MRW model types (via the implicit-operator rename). Extensible-enum / union structs (and other non-MRW body types) never get this helper method generated.\\n\\nResult: any TypeSpec operation that passes a `union` / extensible-enum as `@bodyRoot` produces code that fails to compile.\\n\\n### Current workaround (Marketplace SDK)\\n\\nA hand-written partial is shipped to supply the missing method so the generated code compiles:\\n\\n```csharp\\n// sdk/marketplace/Azure.ResourceManager.Marketplace/src/Customize/Models/PrivateStoreOperation.cs\\npublic readonly partial struct PrivateStoreOperation\\n{\\n    internal static RequestContent ToRequestContent(PrivateStoreOperation? payload)\\n    {\\n        if (payload == null) return null;\\n        return RequestContent.Create(payload.Value.ToString());\\n    }\\n}\\n```\\n\\nAlternative workaround: `@@alternateType(...payload, string, \\u0026#34;csharp\\u0026#34;)` — but this erases the strongly-typed enum from the public API surface, which is undesirable.\\n\\n### Repro command\\n\\n```powershell\\ncd sdk\\\\marketplace\\\\Azure.ResourceManager.Marketplace\\ndotnet build /t:GenerateCode /p:LocalSpecRepo=\\u0026#34;...\\\\specification\\\\marketplace\\\\resource-manager\\\\Microsoft.Marketplace\\\\Marketplace\\u0026#34; /p:SaveInputs=true\\n# Without the SDK-side partial, `dotnet build` fails with CS0117 on the Post/Delete methods.\\n```\\n\\n### Expected behavior\\n\\nThe MPG generator should emit `ToRequestContent` (or equivalent request-body serialization) for **all** non-primitive body types it emits the call site for — including extensible-enum / union structs — or otherwise route non-MRW body serialization through a type-agnostic helper (e.g. `RequestContent.Create(payload.Value.ToString())` inline at the call site).\\n\\n### Impact\\n\\nAny TypeSpec MPG spec that uses an extensible-enum / union as a body parameter will fail to compile out-of-the-box and require a hand-written SDK-side partial to unblock code generation.\\n\",\"state\":\"open\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/58627\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"mzhongl524\",\"id\":13110707,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/mzhongl524\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/13110707?v=4\"},\"author_association\":\"MEMBER\",\"labels\":[\"Mgmt\",\"CodeGen\"],\"reactions\":{\"total_count\":1,\"+1\":0,\"-1\":0,\"laugh\":0,\"confused\":0,\"heart\":0,\"hooray\":0,\"rocket\":0,\"eyes\":1},\"created_at\":\"2026-04-24T01:51:49Z\",\"updated_at\":\"2026-04-24T01:51:49Z\"}","type":"text"}]}}}
2026-04-24T01:54:30.7182896Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-24T01:54:16.39254737Z","direction":"OUT","type":"REQUEST","server_id":"github","method":"tools/call","payload":{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"arguments":{"issue_number":58627,"method":"get","owner":"Azure","repo":"azure-sdk-for-net"},"name":"issue_read"}}}
2026-04-24T01:54:30.7204504Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-24T01:54:16.593048157Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"number\":58627,\"title\":\"[MPG codegen] ToRequestContent not emitted for extensible-enum / union body parameters causes CS0117\",\"body\":\"### Summary\\n\\nThe MPG code generator emits a call to `.ToRequestContent(payload)` for any **non-primitive** request body parameter, but only actually synthesizes the `ToRequestContent` helper method on **MRW model** types. When the body parameter type is an **extensible-enum / union struct** (or any non-MRW type), the helper is never generated, so the generated rest-operation method fails to compile with **CS0117: \\u0026#39;\\u0026#39; does not contain a definition for \\u0026#39;ToRequestContent\\u0026#39;**.\\n\\n### Concrete repro — Azure.ResourceManager.Marketplace\\n\\n- **Spec (TypeSpec)**: `specification/marketplace/resource-manager/Microsoft.Marketplace/Marketplace/routes.tsp`\\n  ```typespec\\n  interface PrivateStoreCollectionOperationGroup {\\n    @Azure.ResourceManager.Private.legacyResourceOperation(Collection, \\u0026#34;action\\u0026#34;)\\n    @route(\\u0026#34;/providers/Microsoft.Marketplace/privateStores/{privateStoreId}/collections/{collectionId}\\u0026#34;)\\n    @post\\n    post(\\n      ...ApiVersionParameter,\\n      @path privateStoreId: string,\\n      @path collectionId: string,\\n      @bodyRoot payload?: Operation,\\n    ): OkResponse | ErrorResponse;\\n  }\\n  ```\\n  `Operation` is an **extensible enum** defined in `models.tsp`:\\n  ```typespec\\n  union Operation {\\n    string,\\n    DeletePrivateStoreOffer: \\u0026#34;DeletePrivateStoreOffer\\u0026#34;,\\n    Ping: \\u0026#34;Ping\\u0026#34;,\\n    DeletePrivateStoreCollection: \\u0026#34;DeletePrivateStoreCollection\\u0026#34;,\\n    DeletePrivateStoreCollectionOffer: \\u0026#34;DeletePrivateStoreCollectionOffer\\u0026#34;,\\n  }\\n  ```\\n\\n- **Legacy Swagger (for reference)**: `specification/marketplace/resource-manager/Microsoft.Marketplace/preview/2023-01-01-preview/privateStore.json` — same POST shape, `payload` has `$ref` to `Operation` enum with `x-ms-enum.modelAsString: true`.\\n\\n- **Generated code (broken)**: `sdk/marketplace/Azure.ResourceManager.Marketplace/src/Generated/PrivateStoreCollectionInfoResource.cs`\\n  ```csharp\\n  public virtual Response Delete(PrivateStoreOperation? payload = default, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)\\n  {\\n      // ...\\n      using var message = _restClient.CreateDeleteRequest(\\n          Id.SubscriptionId, Guid.Parse(Id.Name), Guid.Parse(Id.Parent.Name),\\n          PrivateStoreOperation.ToRequestContent(payload),   // \\u0026lt;-- CS0117 here\\n          context);\\n      // ...\\n  }\\n  ```\\n  `PrivateStoreOperation` is the generated extensible-enum struct (`Generated/Models/PrivateStoreOperation.cs`) and has no `ToRequestContent` method.\\n\\n### Root cause (MPG generator source)\\n\\n- **Microsoft.Generator.CSharp.ClientModel** / `ParameterContextRegistry` emits `.ToRequestContent(payload)` for any non-primitive body parameter.\\n- **SerializationVisitor** (http-client-csharp-mgmt) only synthesizes the `ToRequestContent` helper on MRW model types (via the implicit-operator rename). Extensible-enum / union structs (and other non-MRW body types) never get this helper method generated.\\n\\nResult: any TypeSpec operation that passes a `union` / extensible-enum as `@bodyRoot` produces code that fails to compile.\\n\\n### Current workaround (Marketplace SDK)\\n\\nA hand-written partial is shipped to supply the missing method so the generated code compiles:\\n\\n```csharp\\n// sdk/marketplace/Azure.ResourceManager.Marketplace/src/Customize/Models/PrivateStoreOperation.cs\\npublic readonly partial struct PrivateStoreOperation\\n{\\n    internal static RequestContent ToRequestContent(PrivateStoreOperation? payload)\\n    {\\n        if (payload == null) return null;\\n        return RequestContent.Create(payload.Value.ToString());\\n    }\\n}\\n```\\n\\nAlternative workaround: `@@alternateType(...payload, string, \\u0026#34;csharp\\u0026#34;)` — but this erases the strongly-typed enum from the public API surface, which is undesirable.\\n\\n### Repro command\\n\\n```powershell\\ncd sdk\\\\marketplace\\\\Azure.ResourceManager.Marketplace\\ndotnet build /t:GenerateCode /p:LocalSpecRepo=\\u0026#34;...\\\\specification\\\\marketplace\\\\resource-manager\\\\Microsoft.Marketplace\\\\Marketplace\\u0026#34; /p:SaveInputs=true\\n# Without the SDK-side partial, `dotnet build` fails with CS0117 on the Post/Delete methods.\\n```\\n\\n### Expected behavior\\n\\nThe MPG generator should emit `ToRequestContent` (or equivalent request-body serialization) for **all** non-primitive body types it emits the call site for — including extensible-enum / union structs — or otherwise route non-MRW body serialization through a type-agnostic helper (e.g. `RequestContent.Create(payload.Value.ToString())` inline at the call site).\\n\\n### Impact\\n\\nAny TypeSpec MPG spec that uses an extensible-enum / union as a body parameter will fail to compile out-of-the-box and require a hand-written SDK-side partial to unblock code generation.\\n\",\"state\":\"open\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/58627\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"mzhongl524\",\"id\":13110707,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/mzhongl524\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/13110707?v=4\"},\"author_association\":\"MEMBER\",\"labels\":[\"Mgmt\",\"CodeGen\"],\"reactions\":{\"total_count\":1,\"+1\":0,\"-1\":0,\"laugh\":0,\"confused\":0,\"heart\":0,\"hooray\":0,\"rocket\":0,\"eyes\":1},\"created_at\":\"2026-04-24T01:51:49Z\",\"updated_at\":\"2026-04-24T01:51:49Z\"}","type":"text"}]}}}
